name: negotiation
description: Multi-round buyer-seller negotiation orchestrator for 742 Evergreen Terrace. Runs LoopAgent with SequentialAgent(buyer, seller) until agreement or max rounds.

skills.name: Multi-Round Property Negotiation
skills.description: Orchestrates a complete buyer-seller negotiation over multiple rounds until agreement, rejection, or max rounds reached
examples: Negotiate the purchase of this property
